opportunities.title: [OSS] rk192324217/cubosapiens_world-tools: Add Share Button to Desktop Header Navigation
opportunities.description:
## Description

Currently, the share functionality is only planned for the mobile header experience.

This issue aims to add a share button to the desktop header/navigation bar to provide consistent sharing functionality across all screen resolutions.

A Font Awesome share icon button should be added to the desktop header UI.

## Expected Behavior

- A share icon/button should appear in the desktop header
- Clicking the button should allow users to share the website
- Functionality should match the mobile share experience
- UI should remain clean and non intrusive

## Suggested Implementation

opportunities.title: [OSS] rk192324217/cubosapiens_world-tools: Implement Functional Share Button in Mobile Header
opportunities.description:
## Description

The share option present in the mobile header is currently non functional.

The button is visible in the UI, but clicking it does not trigger any sharing functionality.

This issue aims to implement proper mobile sharing support using browser based sharing APIs.

## Current Behavior

- Share button appears in the mobile header
- Clicking the button does nothing
- No share dialog or interaction is triggered

## Expected Behavior

- Clicking the share button should open the native device share dialog
- Users should be able to share the website link through supported applications

opportunities.title: [OSS] rk192324217/cubosapiens_world-tools: Fix Mobile Header Search Bar Positioning Issue
opportunities.description:
## Description

The search option in the mobile header is not fully visible on smaller screen resolutions.

Currently, the search bar appears partially hidden toward the left side of the screen, making it difficult for users to access and interact with it properly.

## Current Behavior

- Search option is partially hidden on mobile devices
- Around 70 to 80 percent of the component shifts outside the viewport
- UI alignment breaks on smaller resolutions

## Expected Behavior

- Search bar should remain fully visible within the mobile viewport
- Proper alignment and spacing should be maintained

opportunities.title: [OSS] pushkarscripts/openCSE: [FEATURE] Add a "Back to Top" button for easier navigation
opportunities.description:
## Feature Description
Add a floating "Back to Top" button that appears in the bottom corner when a user scrolls down the page.

## Problem It Solves
Since openCSE contains long documentation and study notes, readers currently have to manually scroll all the way back up to use the navigation menu. This button provides a quick, one-click shortcut, improving the user experience.

## Proposed Solution
Using the project's **Next.js** and **Tailwind CSS** stack, I will:
* Create a React client component (`'use client'`).
* Add a window scroll listener to show/hide the button smoothly.
* Use Tailwin

opportunities.title: [OSS] Aashikhandelwal05/PrepIQ: [Bug]: Frontend fixes ScoreCircle clamping, positioning, and 404 Router navigation
opportunities.description:
## Summary
Three small frontend bugs that can be fixed together in one focused PR.

## Bug 1: Clamp readiness score in ScoreCircle
**File:** `src/components/ScoreCircle.tsx`

**Problem:** ScoreCircle assumes the score is always between 0–100. Bad API data could render invalid SVG offsets or misleading percentages.

**Fix:** Clamp score to 0–100 before calculating SVG offset and displaying percentage.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Scores below 0 render as 0%
- Scores above 100 render as 100%
- SVG progress never overflows the circle
- Existing size and label props still work

---

## Bug 2: Fix S

opportunities.title: [OSS] Piyushydv08/SafeVoice: # Enhancement: Redesign “Top Stories” Section into Dynamic Rotating Banner
opportunities.description:
## Description

The current **Top Stories** section on the website feels static and the story cards can be improved visually for better engagement and readability.

I would like to propose enhancing this section by:

* Redesigning the story cards with a cleaner and more modern UI
* Improving spacing, typography, responsiveness, and visual hierarchy
* Adding hover effects and smoother transitions for better user interaction
* Converting the section into a **dynamic rotating banner/carousel**
* Automatically changing/highlighting stories every 10 seconds

## Suggested Improvements

### UI/UX Enh

opportunities.title: [OSS] AlmanacCode/codealmanac: Submit Almanac to relevant awesome lists
opportunities.description:
## Goal

Find relevant awesome lists and open small PRs where Almanac is a good fit.

## Suggested targets

- AI agent tools
- developer tools
- CLI tools
- documentation tools
- TypeScript tools

Only submit where the list rules genuinely fit the project.

## Done when

- Candidate lists are collected in a comment on this issue.
- PRs are opened for the best-fitting lists.
- Each PR uses a concise description of Almanac as a local-first codebase wiki for AI coding agents.

opportunities.title: Senior Visual Designer Product-Focused  (Freelance)
opportunities.description:
Headquarters:  Remote (US)
 

    Web + Digital Experiences    We’re looking for a freelance Visual Designer with a strong product mindset to support our web and digital experience work. This role is end-to-end. You’ll take ideas from early visual exploration through execution, partnering closely with strategy, UX, and development to bring thoughtful, well-crafted products to life.   This role reports to the Design Lead / CCO.    What you’ll do      Lead visual design from concept through delivery with a product lens   Create moodboards, look & feel explorations, and early visual direction
